name: BENCHMARK ELECTRONICS INC
business: Benchmark Electronics, Inc. provides design engineering and advanced manufacturing services that include both electronic manufacturing services (EMS) and precision metal machining (PMM) services. The company serves original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) in markets including advanced computing and communication (AC&C), aerospace and defense (A&D), industrial, medical, and semiconductor capital equipment (semi-cap).
sellsTo: OEMs in advanced computing and communication (AC&C)

exposures.sentence: In the AC&C markets, we focus on customers with more complex requirements (high-performance computing, liquid-cooled systems, and next-generation broadband solutions)
